arcs.description: The leader has identified a gap or problem but has not yet explored why it is happening or what to do about it.

arcs.display_name: Problem of Practice — Root Cause Known
arcs.description: The leader believes they understand why the problem is happening and needs help moving from diagnosis to action.
The leader is executing a plan to fix a specific problem; navigating obstacles or results.
The leader has implemented something and has results to examine.
The leader is planning or managing rollout of a new program, curriculum, or initiative.
The leader is navigating a difficult relationship or personnel situation.
The leader senses their approach may be wrong; problem may lie in underlying beliefs.
